title: CCD
description: A modpack made to look like video from a CCD camera with decent performance
body:
<div>--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  
A modpack that attempts to emulate the look of a CCD camera

<div>--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  
Includes:
Camera overlay (Toggle with keypad +)
Zoom (Using left and right arrow keys)
Camera sway & shake
Shaders
Do a barrel roll
Animations (Players & mobs)
Voice chat
Sound physics 
Borderless fullscreen
Layered screenshots (F6)

<div>--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
